title: Prohibition of light.
doc_html:
Art. 704.  Prohibition of light.

The servitude of prohibition of light is the right of the owner of the dominant estate to prevent his neighbor from making an opening in his own wall for the admission of light or that limits him to certain lights only.

Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
doc_text:
Art. 704.  Prohibition of light.
The servitude of prohibition of light is the right of the owner of the dominant estate to prevent his neighbor from making an opening in his own wall for the admission of light or that limits him to certain lights only.
Acts 1977, No. 514, §1.
